item.title: PokeTaskBar 1.9.10 (beta)
item.description: <!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="utf-8"><style>:root{color-scheme:light}html,body{background:#ffffff;color:#111111;margin:0}body{font-family:'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif;font-size:13px;line-height:1.45;padding:12px;white-space:pre-wrap}</style></head><body>Conserto: os Pokemon Viajantes (as aparicoes brilhantes de trofeu) apareciam demais no comeco da jornada. Agora voltam a ser um evento raro, do jeito que deviam ser.</body></html>
